mentions.note: Cybersecurity/data security beaten down on AI replacement fears; Cramer won't catch falling knives; wait for price bottom and shakeout before re-entering.

Data security/infrastructure company (not SaaS) providing cyber resilience and agentic AI governance; 34% ARR growth, 22% FCF margins; pullback to $69 offers free entry vs. $92 peak—mistaken SaaS selling.
